anyCredential.label: googleDriveOAuth2Api or googleApi
anyCredential.remediation: Bind a Google Drive OAuth2 credential or Google Service Account API credential that has the file/folder scopes the operation needs.

anyCredential.label: googleSheetsOAuth2Api or googleApi
anyCredential.remediation: Bind a Google Sheets OAuth2 credential or Google Service Account API credential with spreadsheet access.

credential.remediation: Bind a Gmail OAuth2 credential with the Gmail scopes required by the selected operation.
